title: Corporate Entity Resolution Engine (CORE)
text:
CORE is an open research software framework designed to support transparent, reviewable, reproducible, and cumulative entity resolution in empirical research.
Rather than treating entity resolution as a disposable data-cleaning task, CORE treats entity resolution as a scientific process in which computational methods, expert judgement, and validated knowledge work together to produce trustworthy analytical datasets.
